euler-dao.name: Euler DAO
euler-dao.description: Euler DAO is responsible for the governance and development of the Euler protocol and related infrastructure.

relend-network.name: Relend Network
relend-network.description: Relend Network is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure markets for relending liquidity across networks. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

addresses.0x0c4e99cB4bAD1Fbe2707eaf98756a4b624E6fE: Relend Network Vault Access Control Governor
